generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in physical building infrastructure for temperature data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in physical building infrastructure for occupancy data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for synchronization and processing"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance BuildingOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data from sensors used for real-time monitoring and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building models"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for creating and managing Building Information Models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance MDEFrameworks : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering frameworks for automated artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM assets enriched with semantic metadata for BCS components and middleware configurations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools, MDEFrameworks
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building infrastructure operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeEnergyMonitoringInsight, RealTimeOccupancyMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthInsight, AdjustHVACTemperatureAction, AdjustLightingLevelAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for life cycle optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides LifeCycleOptimizationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight
]

instance RealTimeEnergyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of energy consumption data"
]

instance RealTimeOccupancyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of occupancy levels"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimizing energy consumption based on sensor data"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights related to visual comfort adjustments for occupants"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights regarding non-visual health effects from building operations"
]

instance LifeCycleOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing building operations across its entire life cycle"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for facility management decisions"
]

instance AdjustHVACTemperatureAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust HVAC temperature settings based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustLightingLevelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust lighting levels based on occupancy and visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator in BCS for controlling HVAC systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting lighting systems"
]

instance AECOLivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain, exemplified by Living Lab case study"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin (e.g., HVAC or lighting commands) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to the physical Building Control Systems (BCS) for bidirectional communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the Digital Twin, with data exchange and service execution occurring continuously to ensure immediate response to operational changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points, where a central hub facilitates bidirectional data exchange between Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers, integrating real-time sensor data and control commands."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, refurbishment, and adaptation phases, with the Digital Twin maintaining continuous representation from initial planning through operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness, ensuring the Digital Twin accurately reflects its physical counterpart's behavior and data consistency."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for secure communication between physical assets and the Digital Twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC) and standardized data schemas for semantic integration, with extension points for modular service interoperability across AECO workflows."
]
